hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.env(\..*)?$'; then echo "[Hook] Blocked: reading env file $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" >&2; exit 1; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|mjs|cjs|json|css|scss|md)$'; then npx prettier --write "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null && echo "[Hook] Formatted: $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" >&2; fi
